arts.ttl: Tottenham and Aston Villa set to battle for PSG defender
arts.sum: Tottenham and Aston Villa are both considering January moves for Paris Saint-Germain defender Milan Skriniar. The Slovakian centre-back is free to leave PSG this month and has been subject of a loan approach from Turkish champions Galatasaray.
